_comment: Single source of truth for analysis request-key string format. Consumed by both the JS deriver test (src/analysis/analysisRequestKeyFormat.test.js) and the Rust validator test (src-tauri/src/ipc/commands.rs). Changing the key grammar on either side without updating this file fails one of those tests. Format: spectrum pair = spectrum:pair:<x>:<y>:<view>:sm<smoothingPercent>:tilt<tiltCentidb> (view in combined|lr|ms); spectrum single = spectrum:single:<ch>:combined:sm<smoothingPercent>:tilt<tiltCentidb> (view always forced to combined); vectorscope = vectorscope:pair:<x>:<y>.
